calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Duane Olivera, Esq. 707-853-7141, Specially Appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of Ameirca N.A.
James A. McElroy, Esq., 415-282-3072, Specially Appearing for Defendant Ceciley McGriger

Counsel for Plaintiff and Defendant do not contest the Court's tentative ruling. Counsel's request to modify the courts tentative ruling re: Making one monthly payment instead of bi-weekly payments is denied.

Hearing is held. Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

The levying officer is directed to release the $446.41 and any other earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. The levying officer shall withhold $200/month from defendant's earnings for payment on the judgment.

Court to prepare order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
